title: rubus × pseudolebelianus
intro: Rubus × pseudolebelianus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus, two species of raspberries. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudolebelianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function. Rubus × pseudolebelianus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary preparations.
